recommendedImprovements: Keep the premium tone and clear product positioning.
Strengthen the first three seconds and add one stronger curiosity hook.
Keep all language support-based and avoid medical claims.
Show the product name and what it solves immediately.
Make the CTA direct and visible in the last card.
Keep motion premium and avoid clutter.
Match the platform format to the video type.
Lead with confidence, clarity, and low friction.
Attach the product page link and maintain purchase confidence.
Use the top-performing structure as the template for scaling.

jobPayload.script: If you want a simpler routine, CoQ10 (Ubiquinone) belongs on your shortlist. CoQ10 (Ubiquinone) is designed to support a more consistent routine without making it complicated. It is easy to understand, easy to use, and the product page lays out the details clearly. If you want a confident next step, tap below and take a look.
jobPayload.selectedHook: If you want a simpler routine, CoQ10 (Ubiquinone) belongs on your shortlist.
jobPayload.selectedCta: Tap to view CoQ10 (Ubiquinone) on the product page.

jobPayload.hook: This is the kind of product people stop scrolling for.

sceneList.description: Fast premium opener with product silhouette and kinetic typography.
Macro product hero shot with motion blur and glowing highlight pass.
Ingredient or benefit visualization with clean motion and contrast.
Transformation moment with product centered and text safe above/below the face area.
End card with CTA and shop link.

jobPayload.visualStyle: cinematic, luxury wellness, fast pacing, premium contrast, electric blue and gold accents
jobPayload.motionDirection: high-energy cuts, subtle parallax, product hero zooms, and polished typography
